S0-00.coreIllusionEn: Everything must be obtained from the outside world.
S0-00.coreIllusionZh: 一切都必须从外界获得。
S0-00.voidChallengeEn: Unable to stop, continuously seeking confirmation.
S0-00.voidChallengeZh: 无法停下来，持续寻求确认。
S0-00.voidPowerEn: The ability to return completely to the inner center.
S0-00.voidPowerZh: 完全回到内在中心的能力。
S0-00.pathOfReturnZh: 稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
S0-00.guidanceEn: The more you let go, the closer you come to truth.
S0-00.guidanceZh: 你越是放下，越靠近真相。
S0-00.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-00.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-00.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-01.coreIllusionEn: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough.
S0-01.coreIllusionZh: 觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。
S0-01.voidChallengeZh: 自我价值依赖外部评价。
S0-01.guidanceEn: You are already enough; you do not need to be proven.
S0-01.guidanceZh: 你本来就足够，不需被证明。
S0-01.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-01.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-01.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-02.coreIllusionEn: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe.
S0-02.coreIllusionZh: 认为必须掌控一切才会安全。
S0-02.voidPowerEn: The power of letting go and flowing with life.
S0-02.pathOfReturnEn: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
S0-02.pathOfReturnZh: 练习允许事情自然发生。
S0-02.guidanceEn: Control is a reaction of fear; trust is true strength.
S0-02.guidanceZh: 控制是恐惧的反应，信任是真正的力量。
S0-02.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-02.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-02.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-03.coreIllusionEn: Believing that you are separate from the world.
S0-03.voidPowerEn: The ability to build connection and a sense of unity.
S0-03.guidanceEn: You have never truly been separate from the world.
S0-03.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-03.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-03.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-04.coreIllusionEn: Believing you must be perfect in order to be loved.
S0-04.coreIllusionZh: 认为必须做到完美才值得被爱。
S0-04.voidPowerEn: The ability to accept your real self.
S0-04.guidanceEn: Perfection is not the goal; truth is.
S0-04.guidanceZh: 完美不是目标，真实才是。
S0-04.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-04.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-04.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-05.coreIllusionEn: Believing emotions are the same as truth.
S0-05.voidPowerEn: The ability to become the observer of emotions.
S0-05.pathOfReturnEn: Practice conscious breathing and separation from emotional identification.
S0-05.pathOfReturnZh: 练习觉知呼吸与情绪分离。
S0-05.guidanceEn: Emotion is speaking, but you are not the emotion.
S0-05.guidanceZh: 情绪在说话，但你不是情绪。
S0-05.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-05.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-05.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-06.coreIllusionEn: Equating yourself with an identity or role.
S0-06.coreIllusionZh: 将自己等同于身份或角色。
S0-06.voidPowerEn: The ability to return to being itself.
S0-06.guidanceEn: You are not the role; you are awareness.
S0-06.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-06.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-06.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-07.coreIllusionEn: Feeling that you are never enough.
S0-07.voidPowerEn: The ability to see your own light.
S0-07.guidanceEn: Your worth is not the result; it is your essence.
S0-07.guidanceZh: 你的价值不是结果，而是本质。
S0-07.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-07.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-07.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-08.coreIllusionEn: Believing happiness must come from relationships.
S0-08.coreIllusionZh: 认为幸福必须来自关系。
S0-08.voidChallengeEn: A tendency to depend on others.
S0-08.pathOfReturnEn: Return to your own inner security.
S0-08.pathOfReturnZh: 回到自身的内在安全感。
S0-08.guidanceEn: Relationship is not the source; you are.
S0-08.guidanceZh: 关系不是来源，你自己才是。
S0-08.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-08.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-08.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-09.coreIllusionEn: Believing others’ opinions matter more than your own truth.
S0-09.coreIllusionZh: 你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。
S0-09.voidPowerEn: The ability to define your own value.
S0-09.pathOfReturnEn: Stop asking the outside world, “Am I okay?”
S0-09.guidanceEn: Other people’s voices are not your truth.
S0-09.guidanceZh: 别人的声音不是你的真相。
S0-09.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-09.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-09.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-10.coreIllusionEn: Fear of being too late or missing out.
S0-10.voidChallengeEn: Anxiety about the future and difficulty being present.
S0-10.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-10.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-10.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-11.pathOfReturnEn: Carry only what belongs to you.
S0-11.guidanceEn: Responsibility is not a burden; it is a choice.
S0-11.guidanceZh: 责任不是负担，而是选择。
S0-11.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-11.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-11.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-12.voidChallengeEn: A cycle of inferiority and superiority.
S0-12.voidPowerZh: 自我稳定与独立价值感。
S0-12.pathOfReturnEn: Return from image to soul essence.
S0-12.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-12.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-12.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-13.coreIllusionEn: Believing life must have a “great purpose.”
S0-13.coreIllusionZh: 认为生命必须有“伟大目的”。
S0-13.voidChallengeZh: 对成就与意义过度执着。
S0-13.voidPowerEn: The ability to see truth in the ordinary.
S0-13.guidanceEn: Meaning is not something to find; it is something to be.
S0-13.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-13.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-13.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-14.coreIllusionEn: Feeling that you must compensate or atone.
S0-14.coreIllusionZh: 觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。
S0-14.pathOfReturnEn: Release the weight of past memories.
S0-14.guidanceEn: You have already been forgiven; you simply have not yet released yourself.
S0-14.guidanceZh: 你已经被原谅，只是你还没放过自己。
S0-14.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-14.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-14.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-15.coreIllusionEn: Feeling that no one understands or truly sees you.
S0-15.coreIllusionZh: 觉得没人理解、没人能看见你。
S0-15.voidPowerEn: The ability to connect with yourself.
S0-15.pathOfReturnEn: Return from seeking connection outside to inner companionship.
S0-15.pathOfReturnZh: 从外求连接回到内在陪伴。
S0-15.guidanceEn: Loneliness is the doorway back to your soul.
S0-15.guidanceZh: 孤独是你回归灵魂的入口。
S0-15.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-15.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-15.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-16.voidPowerEn: The ability to take responsibility for your own emotions and choices.
S0-16.pathOfReturnEn: Let others step out of your story.
S0-16.pathOfReturnZh: 让他人从你的故事中退出。
S0-16.guidanceEn: Pain comes from misidentification, not from others.
S0-16.guidanceZh: 痛苦来自误认，不来自他人。
S0-16.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-16.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-16.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-17.coreIllusionEn: “I am not worthy” / “I am not good enough.”
S0-17.voidChallengeEn: Deep denial of one’s own worth.
S0-17.pathOfReturnEn: Use awareness to see your own light.
S0-17.guidanceEn: What you deny is the illusion, not the real you.
S0-17.guidanceZh: 你否定的是幻象，不是真实的你。
S0-17.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-17.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-17.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-18.coreIllusionZh: 相信努力可以换来一切。
S0-18.voidPowerEn: The wisdom of flow and allowing.
S0-18.pathOfReturnZh: 从“做更多”回到“成为自己”。
S0-18.guidanceEn: Effort is not power; truth is.
S0-18.guidanceZh: 努力不是力量，真实才是。
S0-18.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-18.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
S0-18.translationStatus: English fields translated from canonical Chinese source

S0-19.coreIllusionEn: Believing the world is dangerous and must be defended against.
S0-19.coreIllusionZh: 认为世界是危险的，必须防御。
S0-19.formula: S0 = sum of all digits in YYYY-MM-DD, then mod 20
S0-19.sourceFile: 《1320 Soul Origin Code System》.txt / S0 Void Gate · 0–19 Training File
